text.message: Weird, the centre with 2 wheat 1 sheep was much better no ?
I think the calculation was that it's 1 pip less with Orr port
he threw away a good ows
and left the board open as heck
yeah still think it was not the best but that's his game anyway
gotta pay more for the sheep u refused to pick
how are u not robbing black here
You say that yet you trade to give him what he needs
i didnt or asked for hefty prices, dont feed him easily
Why do I have to trade if the game allows to steal what I need?
you could slow black down and get an extra wheat secured
You are in a strong position anyway red
Yeah but red can easily connect his roads
Yes, that's why I said you three are equally strong rn
yet black can win faster here
especially with cheap feeders like this
im on 5 if red takes road fyi
i mean u re likely to win first black
oj can also still take road
Ask blue, he will trade you the win with pleasure
what do you mean gg lmao
bro i think blue wins this
black is tricking u blue, he has a vp
Hahahah red Spam buyin devs after you guys mentioned you don't have VPs
i just got 2 devs and defo not winning here
Don t worry blue will help u again
you re defo winning here black
oj is not winning, he can trade
